Apache Juneau 10.0.0-SNAPSHOT API

Apache Juneau™

Apache Juneau™ is a single cohesive Java ecosystem consisting of a comprehensive toolkit for marshalling POJOs to a wide variety of content types using a common framework, along with universal REST server and client APIs for creating Swagger-based self-documenting REST interfaces.

Key Features

  • Universal Serialization - Marshal POJOs to JSON, XML, HTML, URL-Encoding, UON, MessagePack, CSV, and more
  • REST Services - Create self-documenting REST interfaces with automatic Swagger/OpenAPI generation
  • Microservices - Build lightweight, standalone microservices with embedded Jetty
  • Configuration Management - Sophisticated configuration file API with variable resolution
  • Fluent Assertions - Powerful testing framework with fluent-style assertions
  • Type Conversion - Lightweight, MarshallingContext-free converter framework with caching and broad type support
  • Large-Dataset Streaming - BeanSupplier/BeanConsumer/BeanChannel APIs for serializing and parsing large datasets without loading all elements into memory; supports direct database integration via lifecycle methods (begin/acceptThrows/onError/complete)
  • Zero Dependencies - Core marshalling requires no external dependencies

For more information, visit http://juneau.apache.org

Packages
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau
Shared, marshall-free test-support utilities used across the Juneau test modules.
org.apache.juneau.bean
Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.atom
ATOM Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.html5
HTML5 Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch
Juneau @Marshalled types for JSON Patch (RFC 6902).
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp
Juneau @Marshalled types for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3
Swagger Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.ui
OpenAPI UI Generator
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807
Juneau @Marshalled beans for RFC 7807 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs (media type application/problem+json).
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter
Adapters that build Problem beans from Juneau HTTP error types.
org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger
Swagger Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger.ui
Swagger UI Generator
org.apache.juneau.commons
Foundational classes and annotations shared across the Juneau Commons libraries.
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
Enhanced collection utilities that extend the standard Java Collections Framework with fluent APIs, specialized collection types, and caching capabilities.
org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent
Concurrent programming utilities including locks and synchronization primitives.
org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion
Type conversion utilities for converting between different object types.
org.apache.juneau.commons.function
Functional programming utilities including enhanced function interfaces, consumers, suppliers, tuples, exception-handling variants, and large-dataset streaming APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.http
Lightweight HTTP header value types and parsing utilities.
org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart
Core HTTP-part types and enumerations shared across Juneau's HTTP-part marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.io
File and stream utilities, console support, MIME type detection, and path builders for working with files and I/O operations.
org.apache.juneau.commons.lang
Language utilities including value wrappers, version management, string formatting, state enums, and other common language constructs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.logging
Lightweight logging utilities built on top of java.util.logging.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime
Runtime / process-entry data carriers.
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions
Built-in VarFunction catalog for #{name(args...)} script-evaluation syntax.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.commons.time
Time and date utilities including time providers and granular date/time handling.
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.config.event
Configuration Event Support
org.apache.juneau.config.format
Pluggable persistence formats for the Juneau configuration store.

Internal classes
org.apache.juneau.config.mod
Configuration Encoding Support
org.apache.juneau.config.store
Configuration Storage Support
org.apache.juneau.config.vars
Configuration Predefined SVL Variables

Next-generation HTTP header implementations.
org.apache.juneau.http.part
Next-generation HTTP part (query/form/path) implementations.
org.apache.juneau.http.remote
Remote REST API
org.apache.juneau.http.request
Default immutable bean implementations of HttpRequestLine and related request-line types.
org.apache.juneau.http.resource
Next-generation HTTP resource types — bodies bundled with associated headers.
org.apache.juneau.http.response
Next-generation HTTP response types.

org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API

BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.

CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.

Collections classes.

Classpath Utilities

CSV Marshalling Support

Encoders

HTML Marshalling Support

org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller

JSON5 Marshalling Support.

Marshallers

Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.test
JUnit 5 whole-microservice integration-test support — the @SpringBootTest analog for the standalone Juneau microservice.

Embedded Tomcat integration for Juneau microservices.
org.apache.juneau.petstore
Apache Juneau Petstore - shared domain model and REST resources.

Petstore auth helpers — stub validators and other glue used by the deployment-side AuthFilterChain configurations.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto
Petstore domain beans (DTOs).
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.service
Petstore service layer (in-memory store).
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest
Constants shared across the Juneau REST modules.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.apachehttpclient45
HttpTransport implementation for the next-generation REST client backed by Apache HttpClient 4.5.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.apachehttpclient50
HttpTransport implementation for the next-generation REST client backed by Apache HttpClient 5.x.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.assertion
Fluent assertion classes for HTTP response validation in the org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng REST client.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.assertion
REST Client Assertions
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.remote
Remote REST API
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.jetty
HttpTransport implementation for the next-generation REST client backed by the Jetty 12 HTTP client.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.okhttp
HttpTransport implementation for the next-generation REST client backed by OkHttp.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.remote
Remote-proxy support for the next-generation REST client.
org.apache.juneau.rest.common.utils
Common HTTP and REST utility classes shared between REST client and server modules.
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock
REST Server Mock API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.assertions
REST Assertions
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt
JWT bearer-token validation backed by com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow
OAuth 2.0 client-side flow helpers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.oidc
OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0 client.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
Predefined REST configuration interfaces
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug.format
Output formatters for the REST server request/response debug-logging feature.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.filter
Servlet filters that augment Juneau REST server request handling.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger
REST Logging API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management.logging
Opt-in non-JUL LogBackend adapters for the /loggers management endpoint.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.matcher
Predefined Matchers
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics
Metrics SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request observability hook backed by a caller-supplied MetricsRecorder bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.observation
Explicit programmatic observation API for juneau-rest-server — custom (non-request) metrics + tracing around an arbitrary block of work.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
HTTP Response Processors
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rdf.config
Predefined REST resource configuration interfaces that add RDF (Jena) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.reactor
Project Reactor / RxJava 3 / Reactive-Streams Publisher adapters for the juneau-rest-server ReactiveStreamsAdapter SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rrpc
REST Remote Procedure Call API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.otel
OpenTelemetry bridge for the juneau-rest-server TracerHook SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util
REST Server Utilities
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API
org.apache.juneau.server.config
Server Configuration Repository
org.apache.juneau.server.config.repository
Server Configuration Application
